full_text:
Wang Chang 王昌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Chang (王昌). Member of Li Jue’s Tiger Army. Wouldn’t arrest Huangfu Li for ethical reasons. Wang Chang was affiliated with Li Jue.
